title: Imu Steps Out from the Empty Throne
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, York, Unknown person #9, Celestial Dragons, Dragon as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: to be blunt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 800 years is a very long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is true that of the 20 families, the Nefertari line did not move here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, it was believed that the Queen returned back to her country after that decision. I'm sorry, but I'm afraid that details...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About her motives and journey are lost to the Annals of history. We simply do not know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In that case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of "D."?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Why do you ask?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is... a short letter, penned by the Queen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...has been passed down from one generation to the next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Public Courtyard, Pangaga Castle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KyAah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I beg you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Some- one help me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If she keeps squirming, don't hesitate, pap?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I've finally caught myself a giant mermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: excellent work, charlos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: OK NO! OUR BELOVED PRINCESS SHIRAHI!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he! I wonder what she eats!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna ride you to town every single day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you don't listen, you'll know nothing but pain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No! Please, someone, anyone, help me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...RUN AWAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's so heart- less!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We didn't see a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, mermaid! Did you just say NO to me? I won't tolerate such defiance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a stranger, forget about her! It's not like she was going to agree to any of our marriage proposals anyway!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Out of the way, you spineless algae!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't be foolish! You'll doom your country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "This is bad! Her papa and all the guards are all still in the meeting tower.....!! Quick, before anything else happens...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive us, Shirahoshi! We only looked away for a moment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go home and never come back to this rotten place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Big Brother!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: You damn celestial dragons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do away with the small fry...

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: My Invincible slave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WAAHA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: woosh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The warlord, Kuma...!! It truly is pitiful to see how far you've fallen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we can't stop now! Let's do it, Ryuboshi, Manbosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GUT THEM, KUMA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who cares if they're royalty? Not one will com- plain if we burn them in money. Besides, they're just fish!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
